message:
🌱 Convert 8 IIFEs to useMemo in HardwareHealthCard (#10068)

Replace render-path IIFEs with useMemo to avoid redundant
Map/Set/sort/filter recomputation when unrelated state changes
(pagination clicks, modal opens, snooze toggles).

Converted:
- clusterNameMap: Map build from deduplicatedClusters
- deduplicatedAlerts: Map dedup with hostname extraction
- deduplicatedInventory: Map dedup with hostname extraction
- availableClustersForFilter: Set union + sort
- filteredAlerts: search + snooze + cluster filter chain
- paginatedAlerts: slice for current page
- filteredInventory: search + cluster filter
- paginatedInventory: slice for current page

Also hoisted extractHostname to module scope (pure function,
no closure deps) to avoid recreation every render.

Lint errors reduced by 4 (476→472).

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
